description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle featuring a tan chassis with a thumbhole stock and a prominent black rubber buttpad. The rifle is equipped with a long, heavy-profile barrel and a large telescopic scope mounted on top, designed for precision shooting at long distances. The receiver and barrel assembly are finished in matte black, contrasting with the tan polymer or composite stock. The rifle includes a visible bolt handle and a detachable box magazine, with the magazine well integrated into the lower part of the chassis. The fore-end is flat and angular, providing stability for prone or benchrest shooting. At the muzzle, a small device is attached, likely a thread protector or compensator, and the overall design emphasizes accuracy, stability, and ergonomic handling.
description: A modern tan and black bolt-action sniper rifle with a thumbhole stock, heavy barrel, large scope, and detachable magazine. Designed for precision and stability, it features a robust chassis and ergonomic details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan thumbhole stock, black buttpad, long barrel, large scope, and magazine well.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, scope tube, and narrow profile of the barrel and chassis.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, scope, and the full length of the barrel and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttpad, thumbhole stock, and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
